question: Despite losing $39,000 on every vehicle produced at its Normal, Illinois factory, what strategy is Rivian employing to achieve a gross profit in 2024?
answer: Rivian is banking on cost savings to achieve a gross profit in 2024.

video: Workers at the Rivian factory in Normal, Illinois are assembling vehicles on a production line.
text: Rivian is banking on cost savings to achieve a gross profit in 2024.
